en: Hear what the LORD says:Arise, plead your case before the mountains, and let the hills hear your voice.
zh: 你們當聽耶和華所說的話： “你要起來，向大山爭辯， 讓小山可以聽見你的聲音。

en: Hear, you mountains, the indictment of the LORD, and you enduring foundations of the earth, for the LORD has an indictment against his people, and he will contend with Israel.
zh: 大山啊！你們要聽耶和華的爭辯。 大地永久的根基啊！你們要聽， 因為耶和華與他的子民爭辯， 和以色列爭論。

en: "O my people, what have I done to you? How have I wearied you? Answer me!
zh: 我的子民啊，我向你作了甚麼呢？ 我在甚麼事上叫你厭煩呢？ 你可以回答我。

en: For I brought you up from the land of Egypt and redeemed you from the house of slavery, and I sent before you Moses, Aaron, and Miriam.
zh: 我曾經把你從埃及地領上來， 把你從為奴之家贖出來； 我也差派了摩西、亞倫和米利暗在你前面行。

en: O my people, remember what Balak king of Moab devised, and what Balaam the son of Beor answered him, and what happened from Shittim to Gilgal, that you may know the saving acts of the LORD."
zh: 我的民哪！你們要追念， 摩押王巴勒圖謀過甚麼， 比珥的兒子巴蘭又答應了他甚麼， 以及你們從什亭到吉甲所發生的事， 好使你們知道耶和華公義的作為。”

en: "With what shall I come before the LORD, and bow myself before God on high? Shall I come before him with burnt offerings, with calves a year old?
zh: 我朝見耶和華， 在至高的 神面前叩拜，當獻上甚麼呢？ 我朝見他的時候，當獻上燔祭， 當獻上一歲的牛犢嗎？

en: Will the LORD be pleased with thousands of rams, with ten thousands of rivers of oil? Shall I give my firstborn for my transgression, the fruit of my body for the sin of my soul?"
zh: 耶和華喜悅千千的公羊， 或是萬萬的油河嗎？ 為我的過犯，我可以獻上我的長子嗎？ 為我的罪惡，獻上我親生的孩子嗎？

en: He has told you, O man, what is good; and what does the LORD require of you but to do justice, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with your God?
zh: 世人哪！耶和華已經指示你甚麼是善， 他向你所要的又是甚麼； 無非是要你行公義，好憐憫， 謙虛謹慎與你的 神同行。

en: The voice of the LORD cries to the city- and it is sound wisdom to fear your name: "Hear of the rod and of him who appointed it!
zh: 聽啊！耶和華向這城呼叫， 敬畏你的名就是智慧； 支派和城裡的會眾啊！你們要聽。

en: Can I forget any longer the treasures of wickedness in the house of the wicked, and the scant measure that is accursed?
zh: 我怎能忘記惡人家中的不義之財， 和那些可咒詛的小升斗呢？

en: Shall I acquit the man with wicked scales and with a bag of deceitful weights?
zh: 用不義的天平， 和袋中詐騙的法碼的人， 我怎能算他為清潔呢？

en: Your rich men are full of violence; your inhabitants speak lies, and their tongue is deceitful in their mouth.
zh: 城裡的財主充滿了強暴， 其中的居民也說假話； 他們口中的舌頭是詭詐的。

en: Therefore I strike you with a grievous blow, making you desolate because of your sins.
zh: 因此我擊打你，使你生病 ， 因你的罪惡，使你荒涼。

en: You shall eat, but not be satisfied, and there shall be hunger within you; you shall put away, but not preserve, and what you preserve I will give to the sword.
zh: 你要吃，卻吃不飽； 因你的腹中常有疾病。 你要懷孕，卻不能生下來； 你生下來的， 我都要交給刀劍。

en: You shall sow, but not reap; you shall tread olives, but not anoint yourselves with oil; you shall tread grapes, but not drink wine.
zh: 你要撒種，卻不得收割， 你要榨橄欖油，卻不得油抹身； 你要榨葡萄汁，卻不得酒喝。

en: For you have kept the statutes of Omri, and all the works of the house of Ahab; and you have walked in their counsels, that I may make you a desolation, and your inhabitants a hissing; so you shall bear the scorn of my people."
zh: 你跟隨了暗利的規例 和亞哈家一切所行的， 順從了他們的計謀； 因此，我必使你荒涼， 使你 的居民被嗤笑； 你們也必擔當我民的羞辱。
